## Summary
<!-- Describe the change in 1-3 sentences -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`flutter test`)
- [ ] No new analyzer warnings (`dart analyze`)
- [ ] Code formatted (`dart format .`)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or tokens
- [ ] Tokens use `flutter_secure_storage` (not SharedPreferences)
- [ ] HTTPS enforced for new network calls
- [ ] Accessibility: Semantics labels on new interactive elements
- [ ] Touch targets >= 48x48dp

## Security Considerations
<!-- Does this change affect auth, networking, or data storage? If so, describe. -->
N/A

## Test Plan
<!-- How did you verify this change? -->
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
